ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "features_labels" TEXT /* Labels assigned to the features used in the experiment */,
  "time_steps" INTEGER /* Number of time steps used in the experiment */,
  "forecast_steps" INTEGER /* Number of forecast steps used in the experiment */,
  "stacks_and_units" INTEGER /* Number of stacks and units used in the experiment */,
  "use_regularization" INTEGER /* Whether regularization is used in the experiment */,
  "use_dropout" INTEGER /* Whether dropout is used in the experiment */,
  "splits" INTEGER /* Number of splits used in the experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used in the experiment */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Whether the experiment is done */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the experiment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the algorithm */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the feature */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the feature */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_features" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the feature in the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the feature assignment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature assignment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the feature assignment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the result record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the result record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the result record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration record was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the configuration record */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
